meta.race_name: Safer Gambling At CopyBet Mares' Handicap Hurdle

rankings.name: Jessie Jump Jet
key_positive_factors: Highly encouraging return from a 10-month break with a third-place finish at Hereford
Form of that return run has been strongly franked by subsequent winners
Operating from an unchanged mark of 88, which looks lenient based on her RPR of 107
key_risks: Needs to prove consistency after a long layoff
Has previously struggled to build on promising efforts in her earlier career

rankings.name: Callin Baton Rouge
key_positive_factors: Reliable mare who recently posted a career-best RPR of 108 when second at Doncaster
Proven ability to run well after a short break (off since December)
Stays the trip well and is very consistent at this Class 5 level
key_risks: Lack of recent run compared to some rivals who have raced in 2026
Wait for a win continues; can find one or two too good in the finish

rankings.name: Ever Ready
key_positive_factors: Clear upward trajectory with a strong second at Southwell just three weeks ago
RPR of 102 indicates she is ahead of her current OR of 94
Lightly raced profile suggests more improvement is likely
key_risks: Up 3lb for her recent second and still seeking her maiden victory
Relative lack of experience in tactical handicap hurdles

rankings.name: Laffer Curve
key_positive_factors: Representing the powerful Dan Skelton yard on her handicap debut
Showed fair novice form and likely to improve significantly for the switch to handicapping
Daughter of Jack Hobbs who is bred to stay well
key_risks: Well-held third at Sedgefield latest and needs to find a better gear
Current RPR of 98 leaves her with a bit to find against the principals

rankings.name: Rosa Diaz
key_positive_factors: Winning Irish pointer who showed promise on her rules debut at Ludlow (RPR 103)
First-time cheekpieces applied today to sharpen her focus for handicap debut
key_risks: Has regressed in two starts since her debut, including a remote fifth at Carlisle
Jumping has looked untidy under pressure in recent outings

rankings.name: Innisfree Pearl
key_positive_factors: Coming from the in-form Alan King yard following a creditable run on the Flat
Potential to improve now switched to handicaps over hurdles
key_risks: Hurdling form to date has been modest and lacks the RPR depth of others
Needs a significant step forward in jumping fluency

rankings.name: No No Fizz
key_positive_factors: Dual winner last season who is capable when at the top of her game
Dropped back to hurdles where her previous best form resides
key_risks: Poor recent form, including a failed chasing stint and a lacklustre return to hurdles
Abysmal Top Speed (TS) of 16 suggests she is struggling for rhythm

rankings.name: McFlo
key_positive_factors: Handicap debut provides a fresh start off a low mark of 79
key_risks: Yet to show any form of note and was pulled up on her latest start
Significant improvement required to even be competitive in this field

forecast_top_3.combination: Jessie Jump Jet > Callin Baton Rouge
Callin Baton Rouge > Jessie Jump Jet

tricast_top_3.combination: Jessie Jump Jet > Callin Baton Rouge > Ever Ready
Callin Baton Rouge > Jessie Jump Jet > Ever Ready
Jessie Jump Jet > Ever Ready > Callin Baton Rouge

pace_analysis.insight: First-time cheekpieces for the winning Irish pointer Rosa Diaz suggest an aggressive front-running strategy, which should play into the hands of the tactically versatile Jessie Jump Jet.

market_comparison.adjustment_reason: Sticking to ratings; late intelligence appears to conflate past Hereford form with today's event, providing no actionable physical or support data.
Upgraded win probability from 0.22 to 0.24 based on 'stable whispers' level support, including 'next best' tags and positive tipster sentiment on X.
Sticking to ratings; no late intelligence found to justify the significant market support (3/1) relative to model expectations.
